global.description: The ad features a prominent logo and product icons with a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a new product collection with a special price.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: ZenDrop logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'ZenDrop' in a clean, modern font against a light background.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: An illustration of two product icons, outlined and minimalistic, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Product icon
elements.description: A single product icon, outlined and minimalistic, located in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: Another product icon, outlined and minimalistic, positioned centrally next to other product elements.

elements.label: Body text
elements.description: Text that reads 'shipping over $25', displayed in a smaller font beneath the main message.

elements.label: Body text
elements.description: Additional body text that complements the main message, displayed in a smaller font.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A small circular icon, possibly representing a feature or detail, located towards the bottom center.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A small button with the text 'Install now', designed to stand out against the background.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: Another small button with a similar design to the first, positioned near the bottom.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A small button with text, designed to encourage user interaction, located at the bottom.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A small button with text, positioned at the bottom of the ad to prompt action.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A small button with text, located at the bottom, encouraging user engagement.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: Bold text stating 'New collection drop' prominently displayed at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: ZenDrop logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'ZenDrop' in a clean, modern font against a light background.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bright and modern, ZenDrop logo, new collection drop.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main headline is at the bottom, and the call to action buttons are positioned at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: New collection drop €29.906 25 Install now, ZenDrop
